3045170.name: Steel Skirmish: Reloaded
3045170.description:
There is nothing so moving as the call for battle. For when the sound echoes through the plains, there is no resistance as to be made to its execution, and the action demands from the warrior the greatest of prudence, swiftness, and controlled victory. And no battle is quite as exhilarating as this....

Steel Skirmish: Reloaded is a fast-paced tank shooter played primarily in the third person. Take control of your vehicle and eliminate your foes from before you! Just remember, great victory never came easy, and exception is not to be found here.

Enter the Battlefield

Online matches are played on a 10-versus-10 format and can be played solo against bots, versus other players over a peer-to-peer connection, or with a mixture of the two. Both teams try to eliminate each other or take out the heavily armored base located at each team's spawn location. In the case of the supremacy mode, both teams will also aim to control the map by capturing and holding the bases scattered around the map. A fixed number of respawns are available to all players, but once they're gone, there's no way to re-enter the action. Lead your squad to victory!

A Variety of Content

Ten tanks are available for players to choose from, and not one is like another. Each vehicle has an individualized set of strengths and weaknesses, possesses unique powerups, and many are equipped with exclusive mechanics. And to match a unique vehicle, the skin editor allows for adjustable camouflage patterns and even the ability to load a custom skin from the game's files.

These tanks are playable on six maps from differing biomes and urban densities. Go from fighting on the exposed sands of the Desert of the Shadows to the dense industrial outpost known as Old Pine Fortress. And beware of those explosive barrels!

And There's More

Test your skill in Survival, an endless battle against computer-controlled enemies that quickly escalates into a demanding conflict! Fight well to be rewarded with bountiful unlocks and a spot on the leaderboard.

Each match is also highly customizable, with the core rules of each match being adjustable. Bots have a more difficult setting for a true challenge. There's no reason to wait - answer the call, and experience the thrill of battle!

highlighted.name: To the Victor Goes the Spoils
